finding_results.notes: Compressed the late food-audit loop and reallocated ending space to an explicit carry-forward boundary: Anika states a no-reset pattern to Ravi and proactively texts Zoe at spiral onset per Zoe's request.
Each targeted beat now has non-numeric stress cues and no more than one explicit time calculation, replacing stacked accounting with embodied pressure signals.
Reworked repeated abstract-impact phrasing into distinct on-page mechanisms: breath loss and a physical cold response.

summary: All packet findings were resolved in chapter 7: structural carry-forward now lands through explicit boundary action, numeric stress-tell overuse was reduced, and formula impact phrasing was replaced with varied embodied consequences.
